### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Replay')

## AggregateReconstructionRequest Class

Wire request asking a domain service to replay events for an aggregate via its
canonical Apply path\. Sent by the EventStore server to the domain service's
`POST /replay-state` endpoint\.

```csharp
public sealed record AggregateReconstructionRequest : System.IEquatable<Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Replay.AggregateReconstructionRequest>
```

Wire request asking a domain service to replay events for an aggregate via its
canonical Apply path\. Sent by the EventStore server to the domain service's
`POST /replay-state` endpoint\.
